footer.desc: Smart, Fast, and Sustainable Solutions for logistics businesses in Thailand

index.about_p1: TNB Logistics is a comprehensive logistics and transportation service provider, offering domestic transportation, container transport, and warehouse-to-warehouse shuttle services. The company has offices and branches in strategic locations such as Bang Saen, Laem Chabang, Bang Kadi, and Lat Krabang to efficiently support the needs of industrial clients.
index.about_p2: TNB focuses on service standards, safety, and punctuality in every transportation process, while adopting transportation management technologies to increase transparency and operational efficiency. The company is ready to be a trusted logistics partner, growing together with clients sustainably.
index.services_sub: Comprehensive transportation and logistics services that meet every business need with modern systems.
index.svc1_excerpt: Fast and secure domestic transportation services, meeting all delivery needs across Thailand.
index.svc2_excerpt: Warehouse-to-warehouse (WH to WH) shuttle truck services for seamless supply chain management.
index.svc3_excerpt: Professional trailer and container transportation services for import and export needs.
index.svc4_excerpt: Systematic management of containers and container yard facilities.
index.svc5_excerpt: Comprehensive nationwide distribution services, delivering directly to destinations accurately.
index.svc6_excerpt: Providing safe truck parking spaces equipped with full facilities and support.
index.partners_sub: The trust of leading companies is a testament to our professional service quality and standards
index.products_sub: Various types of trucks to meet all your transportation and logistics needs.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: We are ready to provide comprehensive, modern logistics consulting and services to meet all your business needs. Contact us for more information through the channels below.
contact.address: 18/2 Moo 5, Mueang Sub-district, Mueang Chonburi District, Chonburi 20130

technology.title: Our Technology
technology.subtitle: Innovative and intelligent systems to elevate your supply chain management efficiency.
technology.tms_card_desc: End-to-end transportation management system with real-time GPS tracking.
technology.wms_card_desc: Monitor and display truck operations through a centralized dashboard.
technology.geo_card_desc: Define safe zones and track vehicle movements within designated areas.
technology.cam_card_desc: CCTV control system for trucks, enhancing transport safety.
technology.tms_desc: TNB's end-to-end transportation management system is designed to support operations from origin to destination.
technology.wms_desc: TNB's truck monitoring system operates through a centralized dashboard providing clear operational visibility.
technology.geo_desc: TNB uses Geofencing technology to define boundaries around key areas such as ports, warehouses, and customer factories.
technology.cam_desc: TNB's camera monitoring system is installed at the front of trucks, inside cargo containers, and at driver behavior checkpoints.
technology.tms_li1: Route Optimization: The most suitable route calculation system to reduce transport distance and time.
technology.tms_li2: Real-time Tracking: Track transportation status in real-time via GPS.
technology.tms_li3: Automated Reporting: Automated transportation report generation system.
technology.tms_li4: Integration with Other Systems: Can easily connect with other company systems.
technology.wms_li1: Real-time Tracking: Track transportation status in real-time via GPS.
technology.wms_li2: Automated Reporting: Automated transportation report generation system.
technology.wms_li3: Alert System: Notification system when transportation status changes.
technology.wms_li4: Integration with Other Systems: Can easily connect with other company systems.
technology.geo_li1: Automatic Boundary Detection: When transport vehicles pass in or out of specified areas, the system automatically records time and status.
technology.geo_li2: Real-time Notifications: Connects with notification systems via Line Auto Alert to provide real-time information.
technology.geo_li3: Time Control: Helps control transport time, reducing the risk of delays.
technology.geo_li4: Transparency & Tracking: Increases transparency in tracking containers at all times.
technology.cam_li1: Live Monitoring: Can view live images online, record data, and review past footages.
technology.cam_li2: Safety Enhancement: Enhances safety in transporting goods, prevents damage, and reduces accident risks.
technology.cam_li3: Driver Behavior Analysis: Used as a tool to control driving standards and analyze employee work behavior.
technology.cam_li4: Service Quality Control: Elevates service quality to meet company standards.

branches.title: Our Branches
branches.subtitle: Strategic service network covering key industrial areas to efficiently serve customer needs.
branches.overlay_desc: Covering key industrial and logistics areas.
branches.bangsaen_desc: Central hub for domestic transport management. Serves as the headquarters coordinating all branch operations.
branches.laemchabang_desc: Container booking and Container Drop Yard services with direct connection to Laem Chabang Port.
branches.bangkadi_desc: Specialized in Shuttle truck services between warehouses and container management.
branches.latkrabang_desc: Distribution center with a 9,000 sqm truck yard, strategically located near ICD for fast logistics.

trucktypes.title: Truck Types
trucktypes.subtitle: A diverse fleet of TNB Logistics trucks ready to meet all your transportation needs.
trucktypes.pickup_desc: Jumbo pickup truck for small to medium cargo, ideal for urban and limited-space deliveries.
trucktypes.6wheel_desc: 6-wheel truck for general cargo with medium load capacity, suitable for domestic distribution.
trucktypes.6wheeltrailer_desc: 6-wheel trailer for large cargo, offering flexible transport with increased loading space.
trucktypes.10wheeltrailer_desc: 10-wheel trailer supporting heavy loads, ideal for industrial goods and large raw materials.
trucktypes.trailer_desc: Trailer head for container transport, supporting both 20ft and 40ft containers between ports and warehouses.

partners.title: Partners
partners.desc_p1: Over the years, TNB Logistics Co., Ltd. has earned the trust of partners and customers across various industries
partners.desc_p2: Especially in the automotive, electronics, chemical, and industrial product sectors, including both OEMs and Tier 1 and Tier 2 suppliers
partners.desc_p3: TNB provides transportation services with standards focused on quality, safety, and punctuality, ready to develop close working relationships with customers
partners.desc_p4: To support sustainable business growth and build long-term relationships as a trusted logistics partner

quotation.title: Request Quotation
quotation.weightPlaceholder: Total weight of items inside the box

company.title: Company History
company.subtitle: TNB Logistics Company Limited
company.p1: Established on October 14, 2020, to provide integrated logistics and transportation services, covering domestic and international transport, to meet the needs of industrial and corporate customers.
company.p2: The company started with a registered capital of 1,000,000 Baht and changed its name to TNB Logistics Co., Ltd. on August 22, 2023, while increasing its registered capital to 5,000,000 Baht to support business expansion and continuous growth.
company.p3: TNB focuses on developing modern, standardized, and safe transportation systems, providing services with a variety of transport vehicles and real-time tracking systems to build trust and deliver quality, timely, and sustainable services to customers.

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.subtitle: Our Expertise
expertise.desc_strong: "TNB is committed to providing transportation and logistics services with professionalism"
expertise.desc_p: Covering every step of operations by bringing experience, technology, and an understanding of corporate clients' needs.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: Vision
vision.p1: Aiming to be a high-standard integrated logistics and transportation service provider by applying modern technology to manage transportation efficiently. We prioritize quality, safety, and punctuality in our services to truly meet the needs of industrial and corporate organizations. We are ready to build trust, satisfaction, and sustainable growth along with our business partners as a reliable logistics organization in Thailand.
vision.p2: The company places importance on quality, safety, and punctuality as the core of its operations in order to truly respond to the needs of customers in the industrial and business sectors, under transparent, verifiable working standards, taking long-term value into consideration.
vision.p3: At the same time, TNB aims to build maximum confidence and satisfaction for customers and business partners through continuous development of personnel, work processes, and innovation for stable and sustainable growth, along with being a reliable logistics organization that plays an important role in driving Thailand logistics system in the future.

service.dev_desc: Providing comprehensive packaging development and design services for the automotive industry, covering a wide range of materials such as paper, steel, wood, and plastic, with a focus on strong, safe designs suitable for transportation and storage. The company's packaging development process operates systematically, from conceptual design, prototyping, real-world testing, to final approval, all within a 7-day prototyping timeframe for fast and accurate customer response.
service.dev_sec1_desc: Full of experience and expertise, our team doesn't just produce standard packaging, but closely designs engineered solutions customized to the specific needs of each project.
service.dev_sec2_desc: Developing a Transportation Management System (TMS) with our own in-house team to ensure the system seamlessly aligns with the diverse requirements and needs of each customer.
service.dev_sec3_desc: Using world-class software like AutoCAD and SolidWorks 3D to create highly precise and complex packaging structures, followed by a Digital-Cutting Optimization System in material preparation to reduce waste and accelerate production.
service.wh_desc: Comprehensive warehouse management from receiving, storing, random checking, and distributing goods, using international standards to ensure your production process is uninterrupted.
service.wh_li1: Categorized and easily accessible storage system (Smart Storage)
service.wh_li2: Fast, correct, and accurate operations (Fast Operation)
service.wh_li4: Data integration with your supply chain system
service.wh_sec1_title: Categorized and Easily Accessible Storage System
service.wh_sec1_desc: Systematically designed storage space, clearly categorized by product type and frequency of use, allowing for fast retrieval, reducing errors, and maximizing warehouse space management efficiency.
service.wh_sec2_desc: Operating under clear standard procedures with support systems that reduce redundancy and errors, accelerating operations while continuously controlling quality and meeting customer demands on time.
service.wh_sec3_desc: Our team consists of trained professionals with direct experience in logistics and warehousing. They understand operational procedures in detail and can analyze problems and resolve situations professionally to ensure smooth and highly efficient operations.
service.trans_desc: Fast, punctual, and safe transportation services with our company's In-house Fleet, featuring a real-time tracking system.
service.trans_li2: Quality and safety control throughout the route
service.trans_li3: Supports the transportation of sensitive automotive parts
service.trans_li4: Works in alignment with the warehouse management system
service.trans_sec1_desc: Providing transportation services covering all regions and major industrial estates nationwide, efficiently planning routes to ensure on-time delivery, flexibly supporting both regular and urgent transportation needs.
service.trans_sec2_title: Quality and Safety Control Throughout the Route
service.trans_sec2_desc: Operating under safety and quality standards at every step, from receiving goods to storage and final delivery, with continuous tracking and status verification to reduce risks and build maximum confidence.
service.trans_sec3_title: Supports the Transportation of Sensitive Automotive Parts
service.trans_sec3_desc: Fully equipped to handle and transport parts requiring special care, using specialized equipment and standardized handling procedures to prevent damage during transit and preserve full product quality until it reaches the destination.
service.sup_desc: Elevating packaging management with a comprehensive Packaging Supply Management System that tracks accurately and reduces hidden costs in the production process.
service.sup_li4: Effectively reducing losses and missing packaging
service.sup_sec1_desc: Systematically tracking the circulation of reusable packaging from dispatch to use and return, reducing losses, increasing transparency, and efficiently controlling costs.
service.sup_sec2_desc: Controlling packaging inventory volume to suit actual workloads, checking real-time stock balances to reduce shortages or unnecessary overstocking.
service.sup_sec3_desc: Using operational data to analyze trends and performance for planning packaging allocations in line with workload volume, increasing decision-making accuracy and reducing long-term costs.
service.domestic_subtitle: Comprehensive Domestic Transport Services Designed for Business Needs
service.domestic_desc: Providing comprehensive domestic freight transportation services covering warehouse-to-warehouse (WH to WH) transport and delivery to destinations nationwide. Supports both industrial and general cargo with a variety of truck types. Route planning is systematically carried out to increase speed and reduce transit time, operated by a team with experience and expertise in logistics.
service.domestic_sec1_desc: Services to receive goods from suppliers or factories and transport them to distribution centers or warehouses with a systematic pickup schedule. Ensures that the inbound logistics process runs smoothly, on time, and at maximum efficiency.
service.domestic_sec2_desc: Systematic management of distribution centers and warehouses from receiving, storing, random checking, and preparing goods ready for shipment. Helps ensure that customers' production and delivery processes run continuously without interruption.
service.domestic_sec3_desc: Transportation services from warehouses or distribution centers to destinations nationwide with efficient route planning. Controls delivery schedules accurately and supports both industrial and general cargo in all sizes.
service.shuttle_subtitle: Continuous Transport Solutions for the Industrial Sector
service.shuttle_desc: Shuttle transportation services for receiving and delivering goods between factories, warehouses, and distribution centers. Suitable for industrial clients requiring continuous transport on a regular schedule. Helps increase mobility in goods movement, reduces delays in the production process, and can handle a large volume of daily transportation efficiently.
service.shuttle_sec1_desc: Origin point from manufacturers and industrial factories. Supports systematic goods management with seamless connection to continuous transportation.
service.shuttle_sec2_desc: Shuttle truck service between warehouses connecting WH ↔ WH in a Continuous Flow. Ensures smooth transportation with controlled scheduling for punctual delivery.
service.shuttle_sec3_desc: Delivery point to customers and distribution centers. Supports scheduled delivery operations and sustains the continuous production process.
service.import_export_subtitle: Reliable Container Transportation at Every Step
service.import_export_desc: Comprehensive import and export container transportation covering transport between seaports, container yards, factories, and warehouses. Operations follow a systematic process aligned with safety standards, with proper document management and transport procedures to reduce the risk of delays and container damage.
service.import_export_sec1_desc: Receiving containers from seaports and handling customs procedures, covering major ports such as Laem Chabang Port and other strategic ports.
service.import_export_sec2_desc: Transporting containers by trailer controlled by a real-time GPS system, reducing the risk of delays and building confidence at every step of transportation.
service.import_export_sec3_desc: Delivering containers safely to factories or destination warehouses, with efficient route planning and real-time status tracking.
service.container_desc: Providing systematic container management from container receiving, container placement, and cargo arrangement. Container yards meet standards, accommodating both empty and loaded containers. Helps improve space management efficiency, reduces container congestion, and supports continuous customer logistics operations.
service.container_sec1_desc: Receiving containers into the system, inspecting condition and documents, and systematically bringing them into the container yard. Ensures container management starts correctly and efficiently.
service.container_sec2_desc: Arranging and placing containers in the yard systematically, managing space efficiently, reducing congestion, and supporting continuous customer logistics operations.
service.container_sec3_desc: Moving containers out of the yard for delivery on schedule with systematic dispatch planning, reducing movement time and increasing order in operations.
service.nationwide_subtitle: Connecting Delivery at Every Step Across the Country
service.nationwide_desc: Providing comprehensive distribution services covering all transportation stages from origin to destination. Supports all delivery steps including First Mile, Middle Mile, and Last Mile Delivery. Connects warehouses, distribution centers, and destination points efficiently with systematic route planning and delivery scheduling.
service.nationwide_sec1_desc: Receiving goods from the origin and delivering them to a warehouse or distribution center with systematic operations, enabling smooth flow of goods in the supply chain.
service.nationwide_sec2_desc: Transporting goods between distribution centers, connecting a nationwide network with detailed route planning to prevent delays or misrouting.
service.nationwide_sec3_desc: Delivering goods to every destination across all regions of the country with real-time delivery status tracking, giving customers confidence at every step of delivery.
service.parking_subtitle: Support Area for Fleet and Logistics Operations
service.parking_desc: Providing standard truck and trailer parking spaces that are safe and orderly, supporting both short-term and long-term parking as required. Helps support fleet management efficiency and can accommodate future fleet expansion.
service.parking_sec1_desc: Standard, safe, and orderly truck parking area supporting short-term and long-term parking for trucks and trailers.
service.parking_sec2_desc: Fleet management with systematic control and monitoring to support efficient fleet operations.
service.parking_sec3_desc: Continuous logistics operations support services, suitable for logistics businesses and the transportation industry.

login.newcomerText: Drive your business forward! Join us as a partner and experience fast, safe, and sustainable logistics services.
login.memberText: Thank you for trusting TNB as your logistics partner. Let's continue to grow our business together!
